title: Maintain an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural site
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural site demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess maintenance work requirements and relevant cultural protocols

pcs.text: Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Obtain approval and permits from relevant Traditional Owners for work to be carried out and access to cultural site and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain approval and permits from relevant Traditional Owners for work to be carried out and access to cultural site and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain approval and permits from relevant Traditional Owners for work to be carried out and access to cultural site and materials.

pcs.text: Access records of assessment of significance incorporated into strategies and plans for area and site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access records of assessment of significance incorporated into strategies and plans for area and site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access records of assessment of significance incorporated into strategies and plans for area and site.

pcs.text: Investigate and document previous works that may be causing damage to culturally significant sites or assets, if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and document previous works that may be causing damage to culturally significant sites or assets, if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and document previous works that may be causing damage to culturally significant sites or assets, if applicable.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate action to be taken to rectify damage to cultural site, if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate action to be taken to rectify damage to cultural site, if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate action to be taken to rectify damage to cultural site, if applicable.

pcs.text: Collect and record information on environmental systems and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and record information on environmental systems and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and record information on environmental systems and procedures.

pcs.text: Identify machinery, tools, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify machinery, tools, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify machinery, tools, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works.

pcs.text: Identify traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or modern repair and maintenance techniques, if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or modern repair and maintenance techniques, if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or modern repair and maintenance techniques, if applicable.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess maintenance work requirements and relevant cultural protocols

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance

pcs.text: Organise machinery, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works, and undertake pre-maintenance checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise machinery, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works, and undertake pre-maintenance checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise machinery, equipment and materials to carry out maintenance works, and undertake pre-maintenance checks.

pcs.text: Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials.

pcs.text: Identify and record safety hazards and apply safe work policies and procedures for all maintenance work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record safety hazards and apply safe work policies and procedures for all maintenance work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record safety hazards and apply safe work policies and procedures for all maintenance work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for maintenance

elements.title: Maintain condition of cultural site

pcs.text: Undertake maintenance work according to organisational procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake maintenance work according to organisational procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake maintenance work according to organisational procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Confirm maintenance work meets environmental sustainability requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm maintenance work meets environmental sustainability requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm maintenance work meets environmental sustainability requirements.

pcs.text: Apply and communicate continuous improvement strategies relevant to own area of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply and communicate continuous improvement strategies relevant to own area of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply and communicate continuous improvement strategies relevant to own area of responsibility.

pcs.text: Support team members to identify possible areas for continuous improvement practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Support team members to identify possible areas for continuous improvement practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support team members to identify possible areas for continuous improvement practices.

pcs.text: Report evidence of deterioration and wear to Traditional Owners, and supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report evidence of deterioration and wear to Traditional Owners, and supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report evidence of deterioration and wear to Traditional Owners, and supervisor.

pcs.text: Record maintenance work according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and approvals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record maintenance work according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and approvals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record maintenance work according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and approvals.

pcs.text: Clean site on completion of maintenance works according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and supervisor’s instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean site on completion of maintenance works according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and supervisor’s instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean site on completion of maintenance works according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and supervisor’s instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain condition of cultural site

elements.title: Protect cultural site

pcs.text: Report any breach of cultural protocols, legislation or organisation regulations to Traditional Owners, and supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any breach of cultural protocols, legislation or organisation regulations to Traditional Owners, and supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any breach of cultural protocols, legislation or organisation regulations to Traditional Owners, and supervisor.

pcs.text: Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisation procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practices and protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisation procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practices and protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisation procedures and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practices and protocols.

pcs.text: Provide information to employees and contractors to ensure significance of cultural site is maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information to employees and contractors to ensure significance of cultural site is maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information to employees and contractors to ensure significance of cultural site is maintained.

pcs.text: Ensure materials, equipment and tools are removed safely from cultural site at completion of work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure materials, equipment and tools are removed safely from cultural site at completion of work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure materials, equipment and tools are removed safely from cultural site at completion of work.

pcs.text: Protect and maintain cultural site according to environmental sustainability processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect and maintain cultural site according to environmental sustainability processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect and maintain cultural site according to environmental sustainability processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Protect cultural site
